tests.message: Define __init__(self, input_size, num_classes) to initialize layers.
Use nn.Linear() for fully connected layers.
Use nn.ReLU() as the activation function.
Define self.fc1 as the first linear layer.
Define self.fc2 as the output linear layer.
Define self.relu as the ReLU activation.
